module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace root for flat Marix package modules and pipe sender/listener interfaces.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: CLI binary crate package using pipe sender boundary.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared protocol, session, structure, and pipe interface crate package.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Configuration library crate package with flat source files.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core pipe server binary crate package that preprocesses UserMessage input and routes it through a model backend boundary.
